description:
Watch buses and trains move live on the map — real-time BVG updates, every second.

See exactly where your next U-Bahn, S-Bahn, tram, or bus is right now. Berlin Transit Map tracks the entire BVG network with official live data. No guessing. Just live.

LIVE VEHICLE TRACKING
• Watch vehicles move in real time on the map
• Color-coded lines for every transit type
• Tap any vehicle for route and delay details

ALL TRANSIT TYPES
• U-Bahn (Metro)
• S-Bahn (City Rail)
• Tram
• Bus
• Regional trains

REAL-TIME DEPARTURES
• Live departure boards for every stop
• Delay alerts so you're never caught off guard
• Arrival countdowns updated continuously

MODERN DESIGN
• Clean, native iOS map interface
• Smooth animations and intuitive gestures
• Dark mode support
• Optimized for all iPhones

PRIVACY FOCUSED
• No account required
• No personal data collected
• No location tracking

PERFECT FOR
• Daily commuters in Berlin
• Tourists exploring the city
• Transit enthusiasts
• Anyone who rides BVG

Download Berlin Transit Map — faster decisions, fewer surprises, better timing. Every day.
promotionalText: Watch Berlin's buses, trams & trains move live on the map. Real-time BVG tracking — no account needed. The fastest way to catch your next ride.
whatsNew:
v1.7 — Foundation for more German cities:

NEW:
• Capability-flagged support for München, Hamburg, Frankfurt, Köln, Stuttgart, Düsseldorf, Dresden, Leipzig, Nürnberg
• Live vehicle map stays Berlin-only (fully validated)
• Other cities show live stop departures + search
• Cleaner status indicator: 'Live' for Berlin, 'Departures' for cities without live tracking

IMPROVED:
• Faster city switching with per-city smart cache
• Unified favorites + widget across cities
• Onboarding adapts to your selected city
• 22 new tests covering multi-city flows

Berlin riders: nothing changes. Tap Settings → Change City to explore.
